metadata.file_name: Cher - If I Could Turn Back Time.flac
metadata.title: If I Could Turn Back Time
metadata.lyrics:
[00:08.93] If I could turn back time
[00:12.76] If I could find a way
[00:16.80] I'd take back those words that have hurt you
[00:22.27] And you'd stay
[00:25.38] I don't know why I did the things I did
[00:29.31] I don't know why I said the things I said
[00:33.78] Pride's like a knife, it can cut deep inside
[00:38.20] Words are like weapons, they wound sometimes
[00:45.85] I didn't really mean to hurt you
[00:50.04] I didn't wanna see you go
[00:52.55] I know I made you cry, but baby
[00:55.47] If I could turn back time
[00:59.77] If I could find a way
[01:03.54] I'd take back those words that have hurt you and you'd stay
[01:10.87] If I could reach the stars, I'd give 'em all to you
[01:20.17] Then you'd love me, love me like you used to do
[01:28.38] (If I could turn back time)
[01:30.63] My world was shattered, I was torn apart
[01:34.03] Like someone took a knife and drove it deep in my heart
[01:38.68] When you walked out that door, I swore that I didn't care
[01:42.56] But I lost every thing, darlin', then and there
[01:48.82] Too strong to tell you I was sorry
[01:54.07] Too proud to tell you I was wrong
[01:56.92] I know that I was blind, and darlin'
[01:59.76] If I could turn back time
[02:04.10] If I could find a way
[02:07.77] I'd take back those words that have hurt you and you'd stay
[02:15.24] If I could reach the stars, I'd give 'em all to you
[02:24.26] Then you'd love me, love me like you used to do, ohh
[02:34.36] If I could turn back time (if I could turn back time)
[02:38.52] If I could turn back time (if I could turn back time)
[02:43.09] If I could turn back time, oh, baby
[02:56.13] I didn't really mean to hurt you
[03:00.22] I didn't wanna see you go
[03:02.78] I know I made you cry
[03:04.53] But ohh
[03:05.94] If I could turn back time
[03:08.94] And if I could find a way
[03:15.23] I'd take back those words that have hurt you
[03:19.29] If I could reach the stars, I'd give them all to you
[03:28.59] Then you'd love me, love me like you used to do
[03:34.59] If I could turn back time (turn back time)
[03:41.46] If I could find a way (find a way)
[03:46.16] Then maybe, maybe, maybe you'd stay (reach the stars)
[03:54.63]
